channel.title: International Journal of Food Engineering
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in International Journal of Food Engineering

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Shivani Desai, Srishti Upadhyay, Gourav Chakraborty, Jeevakiran Banoth, Vijay Singh Sharanagat, Saravanan Mani DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijfe-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: Preparation of strong, tough and highly ion-conductive nanocellulose hydrogels based on freeze–thaw cycles: performance evaluation under different freezing temperatures
item.description: Article by Shivani Desai, Srishti Upadhyay, Gourav Chakraborty, Jeevakiran Banoth, Vijay Singh Sharanagat, Saravanan Mani DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijfe-2024-0172

item.title: Copper resistant bacterial biosorbents from food waste origin: efficiency, isothermal and kinetic studies
item.description: Article by Shivani Desai, Srishti Upadhyay, Gourav Chakraborty, Jeevakiran Banoth, Vijay Singh Sharanagat, Saravanan Mani DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijfe-2024-0116

item.title: Investigation of the effect of addition of capia pepper spice on the ripening of Turkish white cheese curd produced using cow and sheep milk
item.description: Article by Shivani Desai, Srishti Upadhyay, Gourav Chakraborty, Jeevakiran Banoth, Vijay Singh Sharanagat, Saravanan Mani DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijfe-2024-0119

item.title: Exploring the gelatinization behavior of wheat and tapioca starch at different hydration levels
item.description: Article by Shivani Desai, Srishti Upadhyay, Gourav Chakraborty, Jeevakiran Banoth, Vijay Singh Sharanagat, Saravanan Mani DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijfe-2024-0127

item.title: Effects of home vacuum packaging method at different storage conditions on total antioxidant and phenolic compound levels in berry fruits
item.description: Article by Shivani Desai, Srishti Upadhyay, Gourav Chakraborty, Jeevakiran Banoth, Vijay Singh Sharanagat, Saravanan Mani DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijfe-2024-0091

item.title: Effect of various novel pre-treatments on drying and rehydration behaviour of ginger and quality attributes of dried ginger
item.description: Article by Shivani Desai, Srishti Upadhyay, Gourav Chakraborty, Jeevakiran Banoth, Vijay Singh Sharanagat, Saravanan Mani DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijfe-2024-0019
